title: Dario Carrasco, Jr.
content: {{Top|rwp}} {{Quote|Dario Carrasco came aboard as the new artist, a very reliable and enthusiastic guy, and we worked well together.|Kevin J. Anderson, commenting on Carrasco during the production of ''The Sith War''|[[Wookieepedia:Interview/Kevin J. Anderson|Wookieepedia interview with Kevin J. Anderson]]}} [[File:DarioCarrascoJr.jpg|thumb|Dario Carrasco, Jr.]] '''Dario Carrasco, Jr.''' is an artist who has worked for a large number of [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] companies, including [[Marvel Comics]] and [[Dark Horse Comics]]. He is best known within the ''[[Star Wars]]'' community for his work with [[Kevin J. Anderson]] on the comic series ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Sith War]]'', [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith|''The Golden Age of the Sith'']], [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Fall of the Sith Empire|''The Fall of the Sith Empire'']], as well as ''[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan]]''. In [[2002]] he started his own online comic studio called [http://www.pandaystudio.com Panday Studio], and it is currently a venue for artists starting into the comic industry. Dario Carrasco, Jr. currently lives in [[Wikipedia:Okotoks|Okotoks]], [[Wikipedia:Alberta|Alberta]] in [[Wikipedia:Canada|Canada]]. ==Biography== Dario Carrasco, Jr.'s artwork was first published in [[1990]] by [[Wikipedia:Rocket Comics|Rocket Comics]] located in [[Wikipedia:Vancouver|Vancouver]], [[Wikipedia:British Columbia|British Columbia]]. Following his breakout into the comic book industry, Carrasco worked a number of minor comic publishers, eventually ending up doing artwork for [[Marvel Comics]], working on a selection of different comic stories between the years [[1992]] and [[1994]]. From 1994 to [[1998]], Carrasco worked as an artist for [[Dark Horse Comics]], and worked alongside author [[Kevin J. Anderson]] on a number of ''[[Star Wars]]'' related projects. These included being the artist for three [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] story arcs, [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Sith War|''The Sith War'']], [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Golden Age of the Sith|''The Golden Age of the Sith'']], and [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Fall of the Sith Empire|''The Fall of the Sith Empire'']]. Following the completion of his work on ''Tales of the Jedi'', Carrasco again worked with Anderson on the comic series ''[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan]]'', a line of comics which follows several characters originally created by Anderson for his [[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy|''Jedi Academy Trilogy'']] or novels. In [[2002]] Carrasco established his own online comic company by the name of [http://www.pandaystudio.com Panday Studio], which currently acts as a venue for new comic artists, as well as seasoned veterans. ==''Star Wars'' bibliography== ===''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Sith War]]''=== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi –
